proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for all measured features, Higher `feature_044` values are associated with higher mean `pfs_months` in the full cohort.
After adjustment for all measured features, Higher `feature_027` values are associated with lower mean `pfs_months` in the full cohort.

analyses.result_summary: In the all-feature OLS model, feature_044 had an adjusted coefficient of 0.176 months (SE 5.12e-4; p=<1e-300).

In the all-feature OLS model, feature_039 had an adjusted coefficient of -1.549 months (SE 0.011; p=<1e-300).
In the all-feature OLS model, feature_046 had an adjusted coefficient of 1.101 months (SE 0.011; p=<1e-300).
In the all-feature OLS model, feature_015 had an adjusted coefficient of -0.983 months (SE 0.017; p=<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After centering `feature_044`, the quadratic term for `feature_044` is positive, indicating curvature in the `feature_044` association with `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: A centered quadratic model estimated the feature_044 squared-term coefficient as 6.04e-4 months per squared feature_044 unit (p=<1e-300).
